channel.title: Security on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Security on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Guyana Daily Brief — Friday, March 27, 2026
item.description: Government grabs 22 Georgetown streets, Exxon builds an 8th oil ship without approval, and Kristi Noem visits State House. Plus: a rubber duck, a stolen $7M, and Uncle Ramesh has thoughts.
